## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **Node.js version:** (`node --version`)
- **zclean version:** (`zclean --version`)

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Diagnostic output

```
$ zclean status
(paste output here)

$ zclean doctor
(paste output here)
```

## Process details (if a process was incorrectly killed or missed)

```
$ ps aux | grep <process-name>
(paste relevant lines)
```

## Additional context

Any other information that might help debug this.
